data.title: Multi-Chem Limited Ensures Integrity of Marketing Expenses
data.description:
Multi-Chem Limited (SG:AWZ) has released an update.

Multi-Chem Limited has completed an independent inquiry into its marketing and promotional expenses, confirming that the transactions were legitimate and conducted without any improper actions. data.title: National Electronics Holdings Updates Share Registrar Details
data.description:
National Electronics Holdings (HK:0213) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

National Electronics Holdings is set to change its Bermuda and Hong Kong share registrars starting January 2025, aiming to streamline its operations for better efficiency. Investors should note that all share transfer applications will be managed by Tricor Investor Services Limited in Hong Kong and Appleby Global Corporate Services in Bermuda from the new year.

data.title: British Smaller Companies VCT PLC Announces Dividend Payment and Share Allotment
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

British Smaller Companies VCT ( (GB:BSV) ) has shared an update.

British Smaller Companies VCT PLC announced the payment of an interim dividend of 2.0 pence per share and the issuance of 1,364,849 ordinary shares through its dividend re-investment scheme. The new shares were valued at 79.8 pence each, based on the net asset value, and will be listed on the London Stock Exchange. This move reflects the company’s strategic effort to enhance shareholder value and expand its capital base, potentially increasing its influence in the venture capital market.

More about British Smaller Companies VCT

British Smaller Companies VCT PLC operates in the financial sector, focusing on venture capital investments. It primarily provides investment opportunities in smaller, unquoted UK businesses, allowing shareholders to participate in the growth of these companies.

YTD Price Performance: 3.91%

Average Trading Volume: 84,397

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

data.title: Koenig & Bauer AG Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An update from Koenig & Bauer ( (DE:SKB) ) is now available.

Koenig & Bauer AG has announced a change in voting rights, with Günther Leibinger, through Leibinger Consulting AG, now holding 15.07% of the company’s voting rights, up from a previous 10.09%. This increase in voting rights could influence the company’s decision-making process, reflecting a strengthened position for Leibinger Consulting AG within the company’s governance structure.

More about Koenig & Bauer

Koenig & Bauer AG is a company based in Würzburg, Germany, known for its operations in the printing industry. The company is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including Frankfurt, Munich, and others across Germany.

data.title: Xinchen China Power Moves Forward with Brilliance China Deal
data.description:

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

Xinchen China Power Holdings Ltd. announced that all proposed resolutions were successfully passed during their Extraordinary General Meeting, paving the way for a renewed agreement with Brilliance China Automotive Holdings Limited. This agreement involves continuing connected transactions for the sale of engines, which will extend through 2027. data.title: Neinor Homes Announces Capital Reduction and Shareholder Returns
data.description:
Neinor Homes (ES:HOME) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Neinor Homes plans a capital reduction of over 62 million euros, returning 0.83 euros per share to its shareholders. This move will be executed with a tax withholding of 0.0083 euros per share, and shareholders will receive a net amount of 0.8217 euros per share. The distribution is scheduled with key dates in January 2025 and will be processed through Iberclear and CaixaBank.

data.title: TotalEnergies Discloses Managerial Share Transactions
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ) has provided an update.

TotalEnergies SE has announced the receipt of notifications from individuals holding managerial responsibilities regarding transactions in company shares. This disclosure complies with the UK Market Abuse Regulation and highlights the company’s ongoing commitment to transparency in its dealings. The announcement may impact stakeholders by providing insight into management’s financial activities, potentially influencing perceptions of the company’s market position and operational strategies.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies is a global integrated energy company engaged in the production and marketing of energies, including oil, biofuels, natural gas, green gases, renewables, and electricity. The company operates in about 120 countries and emphasizes sustainability in its strategy and operations.
